diffs.diff:
--- a/build_ensemble.py
+++ b/build_ensemble.py
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+import os, shutil

+os.makedirs('checkpoints/final_ensemble', exist_ok=True)

+# copy the 6 consistent seeds

+srcs = [

+    'checkpoints/ensemble/seed0.pt',

+    'checkpoints/ensemble/seed1.pt',

+    'checkpoints/ensemble/seed2.pt',

+    'checkpoints/ensemble2/seed6.pt',

+    'checkpoints/ensemble2/seed7.pt',

+    'checkpoints/ensemble2/seed8.pt',

+]

+for s in srcs:

+    dst = os.path.join('checkpoints/final_ensemble', os.path.basename(s))

+    if not os.path.exists(dst):

+        os.symlink(os.path.abspath(s), dst)

+    print(s, '->', dst)

+print('done')

+import os; print(os.listdir('checkpoints/final_ensemble'))
